CustomField.description: First day of the forecast month, derived from Forecast_Month__c and Forecast_Year__c.
CustomField.formula: IF( OR(ISBLANK(TEXT(Forecast_Month__c)), ISBLANK(TEXT(Forecast_Year__c))), NULL, DATE( VALUE(TEXT(Forecast_Year__c)), CASE(TEXT(Forecast_Month__c), "January", 1, "February", 2, "March", 3, "April", 4, "May", 5, "June", 6, "July", 7, "August", 8, "September", 9, "October", 10, "November", 11, "December", 12, 0 ), 1 ) )
CustomField.label: Start Date
